title: Smallest addendum wrapper; 5-surface Core Analytical Workflow
public_claim: Smallest addendum wrapper; 5-surface Core Analytical Workflow is a preserved project packet for this is the minimal addendum / spec-overlay on top of the 2026-03-30 base archive.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Smallest addendum wrapper; 5-surface Core Analytical Workflow, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
